title: OrbitChain Campaign Contract Events
description: Machine-readable event schemas for the OrbitChain campaign contract. Generated by campaign/build.rs from #[contractevent] structs.

events.name: campaign_initialized
events.description: Emitted once when the campaign contract is successfully initialized.

fields.name: goal_amount
fields.description: Total funding target in base units (stroops / smallest unit).

fields.name: end_time
fields.description: UNIX timestamp after which donations are rejected.

fields.name: asset_count
fields.description: Number of accepted assets at initialisation.

events.name: campaign_ended
events.description: Emitted when the campaign transitions to the Ended state (deadline passed or concluded normally).

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: Ledger timestamp when the campaign concluded.

events.name: campaign_cancelled
events.description: Emitted when the campaign creator cancels the campaign.

events.name: deadline_extended
events.description: Emitted when the campaign creator extends the campaign deadline.

events.name: campaign_goal_reached
events.description: Emitted when the campaign's raised amount reaches or exceeds the goal.

fields.name: raised_amount
fields.description: Cumulative raised amount at the time the goal was reached.

events.name: refund_claimed
events.description: Emitted when a donor successfully claims a refund.

fields.name: total_donated
fields.description: Total amount donated by this donor across all assets.

events.name: asset_refund
events.description: Emitted once per asset when a donor's pro-rata refund is transferred for that asset. Multiple events may be emitted within a single claim_refund call when the donor contributed more than one asset type.

fields.name: asset_address
fields.description: Contract address of the refunded asset.

fields.name: refund_amount
fields.description: Amount refunded in the asset's base units.

events.name: contract_upgraded
events.description: Emitted when the contract WASM hash is upgraded by the admin.

events.name: contract_frozen
events.description: Emitted when the contract is frozen by the admin, blocking all mutating operations.

events.name: contract_unfrozen
events.description: Emitted when the contract is unfrozen by the admin, re-enabling mutating operations.

events.name: asset_blocked
events.description: Emitted when an asset is blocked by the admin.

fields.name: asset
fields.description: Token contract address of the blocked asset.

events.name: asset_unblocked
events.description: Emitted when an asset is unblocked by the admin.

fields.name: asset
fields.description: Token contract address of the unblocked asset.

events.name: donation_received
events.description: Emitted after every successful donation, once storage has been updated.

fields.name: raised_total
fields.description: Cumulative raised amount after this donation.

events.name: milestone_unlocked
events.description: Emitted once per milestone when its target is first reached. Not re-emitted if the milestone is already unlocked.

fields.name: target_amount
fields.description: Funding threshold that triggered the unlock.

fields.name: raised_total
fields.description: Cumulative raised amount at time of unlock.

events.name: milestone_released
events.description: Emitted after each successful token transfer during milestone release. When a multi-asset release transfers tokens from multiple assets, a separate event is emitted per asset.

fields.name: amount
fields.description: Amount transferred in this asset's base units.
